name: Bambance-bambancen SALT (Nau'i, Ƙimar, Matsalolin Ceto Rai, Jiyya/Tafi)
description: Yarjejeniyar tantance yawan asarar rayuka. Ma'auni don abubuwan da suka faru da yawa a cikin sojoji da na farar hula.
instructions: Mataki 1: Nau'in Duniya (Tafiya, Tafiya, Har yanzu). Mataki na 2: Yi la'akari cikin tsari mai fifiko. Mataki na 3: Yi ayyukan ceton rai (samar da manyan zub da jini, buɗaɗɗen hanyar iska, ɓarkewar allura, masu allura ta atomatik). Mataki 4: Sanya rukuni.

categories.label: Wanda ake tsammani/Matattu
categories.description: Ba zai yiwu a tsira da wadatattun albarkatun ba, ko kuma an tabbatar da cewa ya mutu

categories.label: Nan take (T1)
categories.description: Raunin da ke barazana ga rayuwa, zai tsira tare da shiga tsakani

categories.label: An jinkirta (T2)
categories.description: Mummunan raunin da ya faru amma barga, zai iya jira don kulawa

categories.label: Wanda ake tsammani
categories.description: Raunin da ba za a iya tsira ba da aka ba da albarkatu na yanzu -- kulawa kawai

pediatric.note: JumpSTART triage algorithm yana canza SALT don marasa lafiyar yara. Matsakaicin ƙimar numfashi da matakan tantancewa sun bambanta ga yara a ƙarƙashin 8.

source: SALT Mass Casualty Triage (CDC/CHEMPACK), JTS CPG
